mapper.sql: query_metric_id, database_id, collected_at, query_id, query_hash, query_text, short_query, query_type, execution_count, io_blocks, explain_plan, planning_time_ms, execution_time_ms, cpu_usage_percent, memory_usage_mb, username, application_name, client_addr, state, created_at, cpu_rank, memory_rank
mapper.select: SELECT FROM query_metrics_raw ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT FROM query_metrics_raw WHERE database_id = #{databaseId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT FROM query_metrics_raw WHERE database_id = #{databaseId} AND created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL #{minutes} MINUTE ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT FROM query_metrics_raw WHERE query_type = #{queryType} ORDER BY execution_time_ms DESC
SELECT FROM query_metrics_raw WHERE execution_time_ms >= #{thresholdMs} ORDER BY execution_time_ms DESC
SELECT FROM query_metrics_raw WHERE cpu_usage_percent IS NOT NULL ORDER BY cpu_usage_percent DESC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT FROM query_metrics_raw WHERE memory_usage_mb IS NOT NULL ORDER BY memory_usage_mb DESC LIMIT #{limit}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO query_metrics_raw ( database_id, collected_at, query_id, query_hash, query_text, short_query, query_type, execution_count, io_blocks, explain_plan, planning_time_ms, execution_time_ms, cpu_usage_percent, memory_usage_mb, username, application_name, client_addr, state, cpu_rank, memory_rank ) VALUES ( #{databaseId}, #{collectedAt}, #{queryId}, #{queryHash}, #{queryText}, #{shortQuery}, #{queryType}, #{executionCount}, #{ioBlocks}, #{explainPlan}, #{planningTimeMs}, #{executionTimeMs}, #{cpuUsagePercent}, #{memoryUsageMb}, #{username}, #{applicationName}, #{clientAddr}, #{state}, #{cpuRank}, #{memoryRank} )
mapper.update: UPDATE query_metrics_raw SET database_id = #{databaseId}, collected_at = #{collectedAt}, query_id = #{queryId}, query_hash = #{queryHash}, query_text = #{queryText}, short_query = #{shortQuery}, query_type = #{queryType}, execution_count = #{executionCount}, io_blocks = #{ioBlocks}, explain_plan = #{explainPlan}, planning_time_ms = #{planningTimeMs}, execution_time_ms = #{executionTimeMs}, cpu_usage_percent = #{cpuUsagePercent}, memory_usage_mb = #{memoryUsageMb}, username = #{username}, application_name = #{applicationName}, client_addr = #{clientAddr}, state = #{state}, cpu_rank = #{cpuRank}, memory_rank = #{memoryRank} WHERE query_metric_id = #{queryMetricId}
